name: Emma Original
tagline: Award-winning European memory foam mattress at a budget price
description: The Emma Original is Europe's most-awarded mattress, now available in the US. Its three-layer foam design combines pressure-relieving memory foam with a supportive base and a breathable Airgocell top layer. With over 3 million mattresses sold and a 365-night trial, it's a proven performer for budget-conscious shoppers who don't want to compromise.
seoTitle: Emma Original Mattress 2026: Award-Winning Comfort on a Budget?
seoDescription: Emma Original: Europe's most-awarded mattress now in the US. 365-night trial, budget pricing. Is it worth the hype? Find out here!
